context7.description: Live documentation lookup for libraries (FastAPI, Django, SQLAlchemy, etc.)

insaits.description: AI-to-AI security monitoring. Install: pip install insa-its

playwright.description: Browser automation and testing via Playwright

exa-web-search.description: Web search and research via Exa API

aws-docs.description: Official AWS documentation — EKS, SageMaker, IAM, CDK, Boto3, all services. Used by /infra-plan /terraform-review /experiment-review

kubernetes.description: kubectl operations — get pods, logs, describe, apply. Claude can ACTUALLY run kubectl during /k8s-debug instead of just generating commands

terraform.description: Terraform Registry — module docs, provider versions, resource schemas. Used by /terraform-review /infra-plan

prometheus.description: Query Prometheus metrics via PromQL — model latency, error rates, SLO status. Used by /model-health /k8s-debug

postgres.description: PostgreSQL — MLflow backend store, Feast registry metadata, feature store queries. Used by /experiment-review /feature-review

aws-s3.description: S3 — read model artifacts, DVC cache, Terraform state, data drift reports. Used by /model-registry /retrain /data-validate

grafana.description: Grafana — query dashboards, panels, alert states for model/infra health. Used by /model-health /k8s-debug /observability

_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 8-10 MCPs enabled simultaneously to preserve context window
_comments.recommended_devops: github + aws-docs + kubernetes + terraform + prometheus + filesystem
_comments.recommended_mlops: github + aws-docs + postgres + aws-s3 + prometheus + grafana
_comments.recommended_full: Activate per task — see matrix in README MCP section
